'''Iyranis Gravitics Limited''' was a corporation which specialized in creating tools based on gravitic technology. They manufactured the [[Iyra gravity belt]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''
